title: MILP runtime improvement translated directly into profit
prompt: A stronger exact MILP formulation solves a deterministic production-planning model faster on supplied benchmarks while preserving the same feasible integer plans and objective. A proposed business story converts saved solver seconds directly into higher firm profit, but no operational deadline, reoptimization pathway, or profit link is supplied. Frame the computational result and state the missing managerial pathway.

model_specification.model_type: strengthened exact MILP for production planning
model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize setup, production, and inventory cost
model_specification.mechanism: Valid inequalities tighten the relaxation and may reduce branch-and-bound search while preserving the original feasible integer set and cost objective.
model_specification.uncertainty: none in the production model; runtime varies across benchmark instances

fidelity_requirements: Runtime is a computational outcome rather than profit
Managerial value requires an explicit deadline, cadence, scale, or solution-quality pathway
prohibited_inferences: Every second of solver time saved increases realized profit
The stronger equivalent formulation produces a lower cost than the true optimum

evidence_needs.claim: The strengthened formulation solves the supplied benchmark instances faster
The runtime improvement raises firm profit
